hero.title: Code with
hero.desc1: I'm Sreyan Mandal, a passionate developer and engineering student at BBIT (Budge Budge Institute of Technology). I build full-stack web applications, intelligent systems, and sleek digital experiences that merge clean code with powerful design.
hero.desc2: I specialize in scalable architectures and user-first design, ensuring every line of code serves a measurable purpose.

cards.title: Full Stack Web Development
cards.desc: Build scalable, performant, full-stack web applications using modern frameworks and architectures — from pixel-perfect frontends to robust backend APIs.
cards.skills: HTML · CSS · JavaScript · React · Node.js · Express · MongoDB

cards.title: Hardware & Product Building
cards.desc: Designing IoT prototypes and embedded systems — integrating sensors, microcontrollers, and real-time communication for smart product development.
cards.skills: Arduino · Sensors · IoT · Circuit Design · Prototyping

cards.title: AI & Machine Learning
cards.desc: Training models, building classifiers, and exploring neural networks for intelligent automation and data-driven decision making.
cards.skills: Python · TensorFlow · Pandas · scikit-learn · NLP basics

cards.title: Database & Backend Architecture
cards.desc: Designing efficient database schemas, RESTful APIs, and server-side logic — ensuring data integrity, security, and scalability.
cards.skills: MongoDB · MySQL · REST API · Auth · Cloud Basics

projects.title: Holo-Keyboard
projects.desc: 3D holographic keyboard powered by hand-tracking and WebGL particle effects. Real-time gesture recognition meets futuristic UI.

projects.title: Smart Attendance System
projects.desc: RFID + fingerprint based attendance system with real-time dashboard and Excel export. Built for college lab environments.

projects.title: Portfolio v3.0
projects.desc: This very site — a single-file, admin-editable portfolio with cyberpunk aesthetics, canvas particles, and live CMS capabilities.

projects.title: ChatBot AI
projects.desc: Intent-classification chatbot using NLP pipeline. Custom-trained on domain-specific FAQ data with context-aware responses.

timeline.org: Budge Budge Institute of Technology (BBIT), MAKAUT
timeline.desc: Pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in CSE, specializing in software development, data structures, algorithms, OOP, database systems and modern web technologies. Active in coding clubs and hackathons.
Completed comprehensive courses in full-stack development — mastering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB — building multiple end-to-end projects.
Led teams in 24-48 hour hackathons, developing innovative tech solutions under pressure. Focused on problem decomposition, rapid prototyping, and clean delivery.
Contributing to open source repositories and delivering freelance web development projects for clients — handling full-cycle development from design to deployment.

blog.title: Why I Chose Full Stack Over Specialization
blog.desc: My journey from confusion to clarity — and why building both sides of the stack made me a better engineer.

blog.title: Building an RFID Attendance System from Scratch
blog.desc: Step-by-step breakdown of designing, wiring, and coding a real-world IoT attendance solution for my college lab.
